title: EventsMediaIndexFailedV1
description: Worker → API: media indexing failed. Stream `events.media.index_failed.v1` per docs/conventions/events.md:29.

media_id.description: ULID matching the `media_id` on the originating `jobs.media.index.v1` message.

code.description: Stable, machine-readable failure code (posture per errors.md:16-19). New codes are additive per §SemVer.

message.description: Human-readable failure message. Non-PII per errors.md:36-37.

attempt.description: 1-indexed retry counter for consumer log correlation.

next_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of the next scheduled retry, or null when the worker gives up.
